hero.name: PACIFIC DRONE
hero.lede: Canada's focused study platform for RPAS pilots. Clear lessons, a practice question bank, and realistic mock exams for both Basic and Advanced certification.
hero.imageAlt: Drone flight preparation in open Canadian airspace
hero.imageNote: RPAS training and flight review preparation in British Columbia

flow.title: From first lesson to licensed pilot

steps.title: Study
steps.body: Work through bite-sized lessons mapped to every TP-15263 knowledge area.

steps.title: Practice
steps.body: Drill the question bank with explanations for every answer.

steps.title: Mock exam
steps.body: Sit a timed, exam-accurate mock and review your weak areas.

steps.title: Get certified
steps.body: Walk into the official Transport Canada exam ready to pass.

tracks.title: Three ways to stay flight-ready
tracks.subtitle: Start with Basic for free, upgrade to Advanced when you need it, or book a Flight Review to stay current.

basic.name: Basic Operations
basic.for: New pilots flying in lower-risk, uncontrolled airspace, away from bystanders.

advanced.name: Advanced Operations
advanced.for: Certified pilots stepping up to controlled airspace and operations near people.

flightReview.name: Flight Review
flightReview.for: Advanced-certified pilots required to complete a recurrent skills check every 24 months.

privileges.title: What your certificate lets you fly
privileges.subtitle: How operating privileges compare once you hold each certificate. Always confirm against the current rules before every flight.
privileges.footnote: Operational privileges depend on the current Canadian Aviation Regulations, aircraft eligibility, authorization, and pilot decision-making.

reviews.title: Why pilots choose Pacific Drone
reviews.disclaimer: Training content is educational and should be checked against current Transport Canada requirements before every flight.

proofItems.label: TP-15263
proofItems.title: Structured study path
proofItems.body: Lessons follow the Canadian RPAS knowledge areas so you can move through air law, operations, weather, navigation, human factors, systems, and radiotelephony in order.

proofItems.label: PRACTICE
proofItems.title: Exam-style preparation
proofItems.body: Mock exams and answer explanations help you identify weak areas before booking or sitting the official Transport Canada exam.

proofItems.label: REVIEW
proofItems.title: Flight Review readiness
proofItems.body: Preparation focuses on planning, procedures, emergency actions, and operational judgment before a practical flight review.

proofItems.label: BILINGUAL
proofItems.title: English and Chinese access
proofItems.body: Move between English and Chinese pages while keeping the same Canadian RPAS concepts, terminology, and course structure.

quotes.name: Alex Chen
quotes.quote: The mock exams made the Basic test format feel familiar, so I knew which topics still needed work before the real exam.

quotes.name: Maya Thompson
quotes.quote: The controlled-airspace and communication review helped me connect the rules with the decisions I need to make on site.

quotes.name: Ryan Patel
quotes.quote: Reviewing procedures and emergency scenarios before the appointment made the practical portion feel much more organized.

footer.blurb: Independent study tools for Canadian Basic and Advanced RPAS certification.
footer.disclaimer: Not affiliated with or endorsed by Transport Canada. Always consult the current Canadian Aviation Regulations.

assistant.intro: Ask me about lessons, the exam, or what to study next.
assistant.lockedBody: Upgrade to unlock a personal AI study assistant that answers your questions and tailors advice to your progress.

billing.title: Upgrade your access
billing.subtitle: One-time purchases. Unlock the full Advanced course and exams, or add a personal Flight Review.
billing.signInPrompt: Sign in to your account to purchase.
billing.advancedBody: Unlock every Advanced lesson, lesson checkpoints, and unlimited mock exams.
billing.flightBody: Book your in-person flight review with a Transport Canada examiner.
billing.manageOnWeb: Purchases are managed on the web. Open pacificdrone.ca in your browser to upgrade.

intro.title: PACIFIC DRONE Introduction
intro.companyBody: We provide Canadian RPAS pilot study and mock-exam tools for Basic and Advanced certification prep.
intro.serviceBody: The platform includes course modules, question-bank practice, mock exams, result history, and post-submission answer explanations.
intro.courseBody: Courses are organized around TP-15263 knowledge areas: air law, flight operations, human factors, meteorology, navigation, airframes and systems, radiotelephony, and theory of flight.
intro.cta: Register to unlock free Basic content

examLaunch.title: Initiate Mock Examination
examLaunch.authRequired: Please sign in first. Guests can access intro content only.
examLaunch.upgradeRequired: This content requires purchasing the full question bank.

exam.question: Q
exam.loadError: Could not load the exam. The session may have expired.
exam.answerSaveFailed: Could not save your answer. Please try again.

results.notFound: Result not found. The session may have expired or not been submitted.
results.noIncorrect: Good Job! You are ready to take the exam!

learn.title: Study Center
learn.subtitle: Two courses · build from Basic to Advanced
learn.basicTagline: Foundational knowledge for the Basic operating environment.
learn.advancedTagline: The higher-risk delta: controlled airspace, ops near people, comms.
learn.comingSoon: Lessons for this module are coming soon.
learn.lockedBody: This lesson is part of the paid Advanced Operations course. Upgrade your account to unlock it.
learn.lockedBodyNative: This lesson is part of the full Advanced Operations course, which isn't included in your current access.

checkpoint.title: Apply Your Knowledge
checkpoint.tryAgain: Review the lesson and try again.
